criteria_results.criterion: run-validator-b no longer passes the full prompt as a CLI argv value.
criteria_results.detail: scripts/run-validator-b.mjs builds Gemini argv with a short --prompt instruction only and passes the full prompt through spawnSync options.input. safeCommandForLog therefore logs only the short command shape.

criteria_results.criterion: run-validator-b rejects sandbox modes other than read-only and enables Gemini CLI sandboxing with the boolean --sandbox flag.
criteria_results.detail: commandArgs throws when args.sandbox is not read-only, parseHandoff requires invocation.sandbox read-only, and cliArgs includes the boolean --sandbox flag without a mode value.

criteria_results.criterion: run-validator-b applies a total embedded context byte budget and marks omitted files.
criteria_results.detail: maxEmbeddedContextBytes is enforced through budget.usedBytes in buildReviewContext/readContextFile, with omitted_for_total_budget and omitted_too_large statuses for excluded files.

criteria_results.criterion: run-validator-b rejects Validator-A/Codex references in refs and changed_files, not just selected phrases.
criteria_results.detail: assertValidatorBIndependence checks refs, changed_files, and previous_failures with /validator[-_]?a|codex/i and throws with the blocked reference.

criteria_results.criterion: run-validator-b prompt includes the validator-result schema content or an equivalent schema contract.
criteria_results.detail: systemInstruction reads docs/schemas/validator-result.schema.json and embeds it between validator_result_schema_json tags in the Validator-B prompt.

criteria_results.criterion: run-validator-a validates github_commit and tier_reclassification_reason as required result fields.
criteria_results.detail: scripts/run-validator-a.mjs validateValidatorResult required list includes github_commit and tier_reclassification_reason.

criteria_results.criterion: validate-handoffs discovers Validator-B fixtures without a single task-specific hardcode.
criteria_results.detail: scripts/validate-handoffs.mjs collects validator-b-input.json recursively from tasks/handoffs and tasks/fixtures, replacing the previous single TASK-20260430-001 validator-b fixture path.

criteria_results.criterion: node --check, Validator-B dry-run, audit:harness, and Validator-A validation pass.
criteria_results.detail: validation-evidence.json records exit_code 0 for node --check on the changed scripts, Validator-B dry-run, validate:handoffs, audit:harness, and git diff --check. Local node/npm execution attempts in this read-only Validator-A sandbox were rejected by policy, so the parent-session evidence artifact was used as allowed by the handoff known_risks; this Validator-A result is the validation pass.

log.result: Read Task Spec, Generator result, Validator-A handoff, Validator-B handoff fixture, and validation evidence.
Inspected run-validator-b, run-validator-a, validate-handoffs, audit-harness, fixtures, and guide changes against all success criteria.

git diff --check exited 0 with CRLF warnings only; node/npm commands were blocked by the Validator-A sandbox policy, so validation-evidence.json parent-session command results were used for those checks.
